title: The Evangelion lookalikes
wikitext:
[]: The Evangelion lookalikes             Quote Post by Trowa_Ayanami » Tue Jan 17, 2006 5:27 pm Another "I'm bored" topic. :) As the title assumes, post characters in other anime that look like the characters from Eva. Start with the image of a character from Eva and follow it up with the image of a non Eva character to prove your point. Examples: Rei http://www.evangelion-armageddon.com/Galerie/Rei/thumbs/Rei057t.jpg and Cheza (Wolf's Rain) http://www.absoluteanime.com/wolfs_rain/_cheza.jpg Ritsuko http://purlace.net/eva/ritsuko/ritsuko-co05-01.jpg and Director Eclipse (Kiddy Grade) http://www.animegalleries.net/albums/kiddy_grade/Director_Eclipse/kg_eclipse0006.jpg Touji http://purlace.net/eva/other-ch/tohji-132.jpg and Umino Iruka (Naruto) http://www.animegalleries.net/albums/Naruto/iruka/naruto_iruka0016.jpg

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Tue Jan 17, 2006 5:35 pm Theirs a girl in mia hime that reminds me of Rei.

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Tue Jan 17, 2006 10:35 pm I dont really think toji looks like that naruto guy, but the rie comparison is good.

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Wed Jan 18, 2006 12:36 am http://movies.msn.com/movies/2006preview_pirates I give you: Jack Sparrow, Lilith wannabe.

[]:             Quote Post by poetic_assassin » Wed Jan 18, 2006 10:10 am Mana and Nana? [URL=http://imageshack.us] [/URL] [URL=http://imageshack.us] [/URL] Or does that count?

[]:             Quote Post by Trowa_Ayanami » Wed Jan 18, 2006 12:58 pm Kensuke http://purlace.net/eva/other-ch/kensuke-196.jpg and Jean (Nadia: Secret of the Blue Water) Hikari http://purlace.net/eva/other-ch/hikari-197.jpg and Megumi Reinard (Nadesico) http://homepage.mac.com/tatara/nadesicops/iND_r_reinard_3.JPG Asuka http://purlace.net/eva/Asuka/0asuka142.jpg and Lina Inverse (Slayers) http://www.animegalleries.net/albums/Slayers/lina/slayers_lina248.jpg Aoba http://www.geocities.com/Tokyo/Flats/2730/aoba.jpg and Akatsuki (Nadesico) http://homepage.mac.com/tatara/nadesicops/iND_n_nagare_1.JPG

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Thu Jan 19, 2006 12:19 pm Asuka is a lot more beautiful than Lina, to be honest... Is it surprising? I don't have a picture about that male doc in VanDread, but he sure looks like Aoba, I think. Or I'm just blind. Or both...

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Jan 19, 2006 3:18 pm From Bakuretsu Tenshi, aka Burst Angel.

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Thu Jan 19, 2006 3:31 pm I wish i had some look alikes :cry:

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Jan 21, 2006 3:53 am Please use URL's instead of IMGs if: --you are linking to someone else's web or image space --you are posting a large image (dimensions and/or filesize)

[]:             Quote Post by Heidroch » Sat Jan 21, 2006 3:58 am Those recent images you posted carry much resemblance, Monkey. Did the creators of Burst Angel intentionally make those three look so similar to the characters of Eva?

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Sat Jan 21, 2006 4:37 am This guy always reminds me of Kaworu, he acts and looks like him. For heaven's sake he has two names, chaos and Yeshua (Jesus). http://i5.photobucket.com/albums/y181/sefisher/Xenosaga/art-003.jpg KOS-MOS, speshul blue-haired, red-eyed chick. She's quite, kicks ass, and pilots a giant mech. http://i5.photobucket.com/albums/y181/sefisher/Xenosaga/KOS-MOS/kosmos.jpg This looks nothing like the controls of the entry plug. Nothing. http://insiderimages.ign.com/download/image/Japanese/week624/ad_xenosaga.jpg And this guy...has nothing to do with SEELE (or Gendo, sweet glasses). http://insiderimages.ign.com/download/image/Japanese/week624/ad_xenosaga.jpg The similarties bewteen XS and NGE don't stop there.... Overwrought Religous symbolism? Check Blue-haired, Red-eyed speshul girl? Check Mysterious Heavenly Bishie? Check Gruff old cyborg? Check Giant Mechs with relgious connentations? Check Mysterious Religious Artifacts from the beginning of time? Check Non-stop phallic imagery? Check The ultimate destiney of Mankind? Check Human evolution? Check Massive Conspiracies? Check The feeling this game/show is just a drug trip? Double Check ...and Angels we just can't stop killing Angels...

[]:             Quote Post by Six Winged Angel » Sat Jan 21, 2006 6:15 am The Xeno series (especialy Xenogears) is evangelion in rpg. end also, production IG studios is at the animation of xenogears anime fmv.........

[]:             Quote Post by Ryo » Sat Jan 21, 2006 5:49 pm Shinji and Nadia . (It actually suprised me that no one had posted this yet)

[]:             Quote Post by darth_mark » Sat Jan 21, 2006 6:06 pm [url]http://www.thesecretofbluewater.com/nadieva-i.htm[/url] for more similarities between nadia and eva.

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Sat Jan 21, 2006 7:36 pm Chrono Cross object/location look alikes. Hey look its the commitee's room! Hey what's she doing with the Lance of Loginus And from GiTS That visor looks familiar....

[]:             Quote Post by poetic_assassin » Fri Jan 27, 2006 11:34 am Does this count? [URL=http://imageshack.us] [/URL] (That's the best pic I could find) [URL=http://imageshack.us] [/URL]

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Fri Jan 27, 2006 11:53 am Natsumi in sgt keroro looks and acts sort of like Asuka, this may have been intentional since the guy who makes it is an evangelion fan. oes this count? Very Happy

[]:             Quote Post by poetic_assassin » Fri Jan 27, 2006 1:33 pm Can anyone tell me what that giant hand in the backround is?

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Fri Jan 27, 2006 1:38 pm In the picture from Eva episode #1 it's Zerogouki trapped in the bakelite.
